description: FIND-065 (deferred RequestNewNote after blur-save) was fixed in EditorPanel.svelte (pendingNewNoteSource $state + $effect on saving→editing transition), but the corresponding integration test (PROP-EDIT-024a, lines 247-256) still asserts only the immediate negative — `expect(adapter.dispatchRequestNewNote).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(0)` right after the click — and never drives the full sequence to verify RequestNewNote eventually fires. The full sequence prescribed by REQ-EDIT-035 ('RequestNewNote is not dispatched until the snapshot leaves saving') is therefore unverified by the integration tier. A future regression that re-introduces the original bug (drop the pending intent silently) would not be caught by this test.
suggestedRemediation: Add a follow-up test in the same describe block that drives the full transition: click new-note while editing+dirty → assert TriggerBlurSave fires once → emit `{status:'saving', currentNoteId:'note-1', isNoteEmpty:false}` snapshot → emit `{status:'editing', currentNoteId:'note-1', focusedBlockId:'block-1', isDirty:false, isNoteEmpty:false, lastSaveResult:'success'}` → flushSync → assert `dispatchRequestNewNote.toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1)` with `source:'explicit-button'`. Add a second test that verifies the save-failed branch clears pendingNewNoteSource (no RequestNewNote fires; user must resolve via banner).
